⭐**Event Duration: **June 30, 9:00 AM - July 14, 9:00 AM

⭐**New Event "The Great Conquering":**
✦ "The Great Conquering" includes a total of 5 challenge stages. One stage will be available on the first day of the event, and an additional stage will open every two days thereafter.
✦ Exchange "Leonian Barbecue" obtained in the event for various rewards: Luminous Core, Pure Core, Aetheric Shard, and more at the "Offer Tribute" event store.

⭐**New Dreamscape "Culinary Dominion":**
✦ Free unlock during Version 2.2.3. The event includes 2 story stages, and upon completing all of them, you will unlock the new Posse "Voracious Resolve".
✦ New Possee "Voracious Resolve": Discover 3 cards from the "Skill Cards" of all the Awakeners in your team. Choose 1 to add a Temporary Copy with -1 Arithmetica Cost into your hand. If the current Realm is Caro, you may activate "Gobble Up!": Put Temporary Copies of all 3 cards into your hand, but no longer reduce their Arithmetica Costs.
